hero.subtitle: Transfer across Estonia
hero.text: Comfortable cars, fixed prices and a high level of service for your convenience.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Comfort and reliability in every trip. We make transfers simple, clear and convenient.

1.title: Comfortable cars
1.text: Modern and clean cars for the most comfortable trip.

2.title: Fixed prices
2.text: You know the trip cost in advance, with no hidden charges.

3.title: Always on time
3.text: We value your time and guarantee the car will arrive on time.

4.title: Premium driver
4.text: You are always in reliable hands with experienced and polite drivers.

routes.title: Popular routes
routes.subtitle: Main destinations with clear pricing and estimated travel time.

mapSection.title: Trip map
mapSection.subtitle: We provide transfers across Estonia and to popular destinations.
mapSection.card1Text: Tallinn, Narva, Koidula, Luhamaa and other destinations.
mapSection.card2Text: You can arrange a transfer to the destination you need.
